haiku45.summary_excerpt: Workflow references undefined fixtures (fixtures/package.json, fixtures/license-config.json, fixtures/mock-license-db.json at lines 24,30) causing immediate failure when run. Script lacks input validation for file paths and defensive programming. Workflow steps 18-31 are duplicative (should use matrix strategy or composite action). gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: Idiomatic PowerShell using CmdletBinding and splatting. GHA workflow is well-configured with pinned actions and least-privilege. Workflow duplication (lines 24-39) is minimal. Script handles manifest parsing and compliance logic robustly. Failed compliance doesn't break CI unless switch is passed.
